items.text: SPEC AI takes messy notes and turns them into summary, tasks, and share-ready text. Free: 1 successful analysis/day. Pro: 10 successful analyses/day for ¥300/month.

A meeting note is not useful until it becomes a follow-up. SPEC AI turns rough notes into summary, tasks, and share text. Free: 1 successful analysis/day. Pro: 10 successful analyses/day for ¥300/month.
Tiny workflow: paste rough notes, get summary, tasks, and share-ready text. That is the whole point of SPEC AI. Free: 1 successful analysis/day. Pro: 10 successful analyses/day for ¥300/month.
Before: scattered notes, unclear owners, no sendable update. After SPEC AI: summary, tasks, and share-ready text. Free: 1 successful analysis/day. Pro: 10 successful analyses/day for ¥300/month.
SPEC AI is not a big project system. It does one small job: turn messy notes into summary, tasks, and share text. Free: 1 successful analysis/day. Pro: 10 successful analyses/day for ¥300/month.

The gap after a meeting is usually not thinking. It is turning notes into something sendable. SPEC AI makes summary, tasks, and share text. Free: 1 successful analysis/day. Pro: 10 successful analyses/day for ¥300/month.
SPEC AI has a simple promise: messy notes in, summary, tasks, and share-ready text out. Free: 1 successful analysis/day. Pro: 10 successful analyses/day for ¥300/month.

Use SPEC AI when notes are too rough to send but too useful to ignore. It turns them into summary, tasks, and share-ready text. Free: 1 successful analysis/day. Pro: 10 successful analyses/day for ¥300/month.
